name: Cannon Volley
description: Unleash a barrage from your cannons, dealing 20 damage.

name: Storm Strike
description: Channel the fury of a storm into a single devastating blow, dealing 35 damage.

name: Healing Tide
description: A wave of restorative energy repairs your hull for 20 HP.

name: Hull Reinforcement
description: Reinforced plating permanently increases your max HP by 30.

name: Sharp Keel
description: A serrated hull edge adds +8 flat damage to all attacks.

name: Battle Rhythm
description: Your crew finds their rhythm in combat, amplifying all damage by 20%.

name: Treasure Map
description: Reveals a hidden cache on any island, guaranteeing a gold reward.

name: Decoy Flag
description: Fly false colors to slip past a dangerous checkpoint undetected.

name: Spyglass
description: Survey an island from afar, guaranteeing the best outcome of any decision.
